description: NEON h2v1 upsample: bounds-safe implementation processing 8 samples/iter. Individual bench: 42ns NEON vs 309ns scalar (7.3x).
Route h2v2 upsample through dispatched NEON h2v1 (was calling scalar fancy_h2v1 directly inside fancy_h2v2). 27% improvement — biggest single upsample win.
Shared row_above/row_below buffers between Cb and Cr h2v2 calls (pass &mut [u8] instead of allocating locally). SLOWER — compiler can't optimize external slices as well as local Vec (aliasing).

Fused row-by-row upsample+color for h2v2: process 2 output rows per input row, avoid full-frame cb_full/cr_full allocation. SLOWER — worse cache streaming behavior. Batch upsample then batch color-convert is better.
